/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/harmonizer_plugin.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libharmonizer_plugin.so -o libharmonizer_plugin.so CMakeFiles/harmonizer_plugin.dir/harmonizer_plugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/harmonizer_plugin.dir/harmonizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/harmonizer_plugin.dir/harmonizer_plugin.cpp.o  ../../src/libopenamp-dsp.a
